text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Listen up. Jot down these names—I want them as
opponents for my next scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ramonu, Mr. C.B... Ah! Gold Ship and
Sweep Tosho would be good too.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
They all have their quirks, but... still, work your
butt off to get them.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
In return for completing this little task of mine...
I'll show you something spectacular.
